meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell with the Antigravity project template. A high-efficiency guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop watching tutorials and start shipping. The Antigravity template provides a production-ready foundation, allowing you to bypass boilerplate setup. By integrating Claude Code, you automate architectural decisions, turning hours of configuration into minutes of execution. This workflow ensures your client projects are scalable, maintainable, and delivered at professional speed.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in a cycle of endless video tutorials, accumulating bookmarks but zero billable hours. The 'Tutorial Hell' phenomenon is the silent killer of freelance careers, keeping you stuck in a perpetual state of preparation while your competitors are already collecting checks for deployed applications.

It’s time to switch from a consumer to an architect. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it’s a strategic framework designed to eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome. By leveraging this template alongside Claude Code, you reclaim your agency, turning complex requirements into structured, high-performance architecture in a fraction of the usual time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Stop manual setup. Use the template to instantly bootstrap a production-grade environment with standardized linting, CI/CD, and folder structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template with authentication and PostgreSQL integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models via Schema
steps.description: Map your client's business logic into code. This ensures the database schema is robust before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including User, Organization, and Subscription models.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma models for multi-tenant saas'

steps.title: Implement Modular API Handlers
steps.description: Use the Antigravity pattern to keep your API surface area clean, secure, and easily testable for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a secure CRUD API handler for the Organization model using the Antigravity controller pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create crud controllers based on antigravity patterns'

steps.title: Automate UI Component Sync
steps.description: Bridge the gap between backend logic and the frontend. Ensure data types are consistent across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React components for the Organization dashboard using TailwindCSS and the existing API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate react dashboard components from api specs'

steps.title: Stress Test and Deployment
steps.description: Run automated checks to ensure the build satisfies production constraints and is ready for client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the current codebase and prepare a production deployment manifest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run security audit and generate deploy config'

pro_tips: Always use a custom .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts.
Treat your Antigravity template like a product; version control your own boilerplate and update it every month.
Use Claude Code's 'commit' feature to generate semantic commit messages that look professional to your clients.
Keep your system prompts consistent across different projects to maintain a unified coding style.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-swap' feature to replace entire service modules without breaking your dependency tree.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, deploy your MVP to a staging environment and run a smoke test to ensure all routes are protected and performant.
content.conversion_block: Stop stalling and start scaling your freelance business with a system designed for high-velocity output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
